def negative_invariant_computation_not_hoisted_out_of_nested_loop():
    rule_id = "invariant_computation_not_hoisted_out_of_nested_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag nested loops that recompute invariant values on every inner iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
